nasb.text: All these were of the sons of Obed-edom; they and their sons and their relatives were able men with strength for the service, 62 from Obed-edom.

esv.text: All these were of the sons of Obed-edom with their sons and brothers, able men qualified for the service; sixty-two of Obed-edom.

cnv.text: 這些人都是俄別．以東的子孫，他們和他們的兒子、兄弟，都是有能力辦事的人。俄別．以東的子孫，共有六十二人。

ccb.text: 这些都是俄别·以东的子孙，他们和他们的儿子及亲族共有六十二人，都是能干称职的人。
